---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for Capicola
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear, concise description of the problem. e.g. "I can't customize X
because..."

## Describe the solution you'd like

What you want to happen. If it touches the public API (`src/types.ts`), sketch
the shape you have in mind.

## Describe alternatives you've considered

Any alternative solutions, workarounds, or existing props/presets you've
tried.

## Additional context

Mockups, references (e.g. a CapCut/TikTok caption style you're trying to
match), or related issues.
